option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools">
<uses-permission android:name="android.permission.INTERNET" />
<application android:name=".GameTrackerApp" android:allowBackup="true" android:dataExtractionRules="@xml/data_extraction_rules" android:fullBackupContent="@xml/backup_rules" android:icon="@mipmap/ic_launcher" android:label="@string/app_name" android:roundIcon="@mipmap/ic_launcher_round" android:supportsRtl="true" android:theme="@style/Theme.DesaAppsAvalosKoOrtuzarVargas"> <activity android:name=".MainActivity" android:exported="true" android:label="@string/app_name" android:theme="@style/Theme.DesaAppsAvalosKoOrtuzarVargas"> <intent-filter> <action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN" />
<category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER" /> </intent-filter> </activity> </application>
</manifest>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools">
<uses-permission android:name="android.permission.INTERNET" /> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.ACCESS_NETWORK_STATE" />
<application android:name=".GameTrackerApp" android:allowBackup="true" android:dataExtractionRules="@xml/data_extraction_rules" android:fullBackupContent="@xml/backup_rules" android:icon="@mipmap/ic_launcher" android:label="@string/app_name" android:roundIcon="@mipmap/ic_launcher_round" android:supportsRtl="true" android:theme="@style/Theme.DesaAppsAvalosKoOrtuzarVargas"> <activity android:name=".MainActivity" android:exported="true" android:label="@string/app_name" android:theme="@style/Theme.DesaAppsAvalosKoOrtuzarVargas"> <intent-filter> <action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN" />
<category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER" /> </intent-filter> </activity> </application>
</manifest>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<resources> <string name="app_name">DesaAppsAvalosKoOrtuzarVargas</string>
<string name="nav_offers">Ofertas</string> <string name="nav_catalog">Catálogo</string> <string name="nav_news">Noticias</string> <string name="nav_settings">Configuración</string>
<string name="action_search">Buscar</string> <string name="action_save">Guardar</string> <string name="action_edit">Editar</string> <string name="action_cancel">Cancelar</string> <string name="action_remove">Quitar</string> <string name="label_back">Volver</string>
<string name="label_all">Todos</string> <string name="label_favorites">Favoritos</string> <string name="label_profile">Perfil</string> <string name="label_username">Nombre de usuario</string> <string name="label_email">Correo</string> <string name="label_not_set">Sin definir</string> <string name="label_region">Región</string> <string name="label_country_affects_prices">País (afecta precios)</string> <string name="label_language">Idioma</string> <string name="language_english">Inglés - EN</string> <string name="language_spanish">Español - ES</string> <string name="label_notifications">Notificaciones</string> <string name="label_enable_notifications">Activar notificaciones</string> <string name="label_alerts_unread">Alertas (%1$d sin leer)</string> <string name="label_favorites_count">Favoritos (%1$d)</string> <string name="label_no_favorites">Sin favoritos. Agregá juegos del catálogo.</string> <string name="label_notification_prefs">Preferencias de notificación</string> <string name="label_notifications_for_game">Notificaciones: %1$s</string> <string name="label_offers">Ofertas</string> <string name="label_news">Noticias</string> <string name="label_historical_low">Mínimo histórico</string>
<string name="games_search_placeholder">Buscar juegos o etiquetas...</string> <string name="games_no_results">No se encontraron juegos</string>
<string name="news_filter_all_categories">Todas las categorías</string> <string name="news_category_discounts">Descuentos</string> <string name="news_category_updates">Actualizaciones</string> <string name="news_category_events">Eventos</string> <string name="news_no_results">No se encontraron noticias</string> <string name="news_category_format">Categoría: %1$s</string>
<string name="offers_tab_discounts">Descuentos</string> <string name="offers_tab_favorites">Favoritos</string> <string name="offers_tab_hist_low">Mín. histórico</string> <string name="offers_tab_free">Gratis</string> <string name="offers_filter_temp_free">Gratis temporal</string> <string name="offers_filter_f2p">F2P</string> <string name="offers_filter_all_free">Todo gratis</string> <string name="offers_no_discounts">No hay descuentos disponibles</string>
<string name="game_available_on">Disponible en</string> <string name="game_release_date">Fecha de lanzamiento</string> <string name="game_rating_label">Calificación</string> <string name="game_rating_format">%1$.1f / 10</string> <string name="game_historical_discount">Descuento histórico</string> <string name="game_description">Descripción</string> <string name="game_prices">Precios</string> <string name="game_prices_region">%1$s %2$s - Tiendas disponibles en tu región</string> <string name="game_off_percent">%1$d%% de descuento</string> <string name="game_price_usd">US$%1$.2f</string> <string name="game_price_usd_simple">$%1$.2f</string> <string name="game_free">GRATIS</string> <string name="game_not_available">N/D</string> <string name="game_no_live_data">Sin datos en vivo - mostrando precios guardados</string> <string name="game_dlcs_expansions">DLCs y expansiones (%1$d)</string> <string name="game_dlc_hist_discount">Desc. histórico: %1$d%%</string>
<string name="content_desc_rating">Calificación</string> <string name="content_desc_favorite">Favorito</string> <string name="game_historical_discount_short">Descuento histórico: %1$d%%</string> <string name="game_dlcs_available">%1$d DLC(s) disponibles</string> <string name="game_price_platform">%1$s: $%2$.2f</string> <string name="game_rating_star">★ %1$.1f</string>
<string name="badge_f2p">F2P</string> <string name="badge_free">GRATIS</string> <string name="badge_free_exclaim">¡GRATIS!</string> <string name="discount_badge_percent">-%1$d%%</string> <string name="price_free_to_play">Gratis para jugar</string> <string name="price_was">Antes: $%1$.2f</string> <string name="price_free_now">¡GRATIS AHORA!</string> <string name="price_until">Hasta: %1$s</string> <string name="historical_low_label">★ Mínimo histórico</string>
<string name="notif_title_historical_low">¡Mínimo histórico!</string> <string name="notif_title_discount">Alerta de descuento</string> <string name="notif_message_historical_low">%1$s está en su menor precio: -%2$d%% en %3$s!</string> <string name="notif_message_discount">%1$s tiene %2$d%% de descuento en %3$s!</string>
<string name="language_restart_message">Para aplicar los cambios es necesario reiniciar la app. ¿Confirma que quiere reiniciar?</string> <string name="action_apply_changes">Aplicar cambios</string> <string name="action_no_apply">No aplicar</string> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<resources> <string name="app_name">DesaAppsAvalosKoOrtuzarVargas</string>
<string name="nav_offers">Ofertas</string> <string name="nav_catalog">Catálogo</string> <string name="nav_news">Noticias</string> <string name="nav_settings">Configuración</string>
<string name="action_search">Buscar</string> <string name="action_save">Guardar</string> <string name="action_edit">Editar</string> <string name="action_cancel">Cancelar</string> <string name="action_remove">Quitar</string> <string name="label_back">Volver</string>

Agregá juegos del catálogo.</string> <string name="label_notification_prefs">Preferencias de notificación</string> <string name="label_notifications_for_game">Notificaciones: %1$s</string> <string name="label_offers">Ofertas</string> <string name="label_news">Noticias</string> <string name="label_historical_low">Mínimo histórico</string>
<string name="games_search_placeholder">Buscar juegos o etiquetas...</string> <string name="games_no_results">No se encontraron juegos</string>
<string name="news_filter_all_categories">Todas las categorías</string> <string name="news_category_discounts">Descuentos</string> <string name="news_category_updates">Actualizaciones</string> <string name="news_category_events">Eventos</string> <string name="news_no_results">No se encontraron noticias</string> <string name="news_category_format">Categoría: %1$s</string>
<string name="offers_tab_discounts">Descuentos</string> <string name="offers_tab_favorites">Favoritos</string> <string name="offers_tab_hist_low">Mín. histórico</string> <string name="offers_tab_free">Gratis</string> <string name="offers_filter_temp_free">Gratis temporal</string> <string name="offers_filter_f2p">F2P</string> <string name="offers_filter_all_free">Todo gratis</string> <string name="offers_no_discounts">No hay descuentos disponibles</string>
<string name="game_available_on">Disponible en</string> <string name="game_release_date">Fecha de lanzamiento</string> <string name="game_rating_label">Calificación</string> <string name="game_rating_format">%1$.1f / 10</string> <string name="game_historical_discount">Descuento histórico</string> <string name="game_description">Descripción</string> <string name="game_prices">Precios</string> <string name="game_prices_region">%1$s %2$s - Tiendas disponibles en tu región</string> <string name="game_off_percent">%1$d%% de descuento</string> <string name="game_price_usd">US$%1$.2f</string> <string name="game_price_usd_simple">$%1$.2f</string> <string name="game_free">GRATIS</string> <string name="game_not_available">N/D</string> <string name="game_no_live_data">Sin datos en vivo - mostrando precios guardados</string> <string name="game_dlcs_expansions">DLCs y expansiones (%1$d)</string> <string name="game_dlc_hist_discount">Desc. histórico: %1$d%%</string>
<string name="content_desc_rating">Calificación</string> <string name="content_desc_favorite">Favorito</string> <string name="game_historical_discount_short">Descuento histórico: %1$d%%</string> <string name="game_dlcs_available">%1$d DLC(s) disponibles</string> <string name="game_price_platform">%1$s: $%2$.2f</string> <string name="game_rating_star">★ %1$.1f</string>
<string name="badge_f2p">F2P</string> <string name="badge_free">GRATIS</string> <string name="badge_free_exclaim">¡GRATIS!</string> <string name="discount_badge_percent">-%1$d%%</string> <string name="price_free_to_play">Gratis para jugar</string> <string name="price_was">Antes: $%1$.2f</string> <string name="price_free_now">¡GRATIS AHORA!</string> <string name="price_until">Hasta: %1$s</string> <string name="historical_low_label">★ Mínimo histórico</string>
<string name="notif_title_historical_low">¡Mínimo histórico!</string> <string name="notif_title_discount">Alerta de descuento</string> <string name="notif_message_historical_low">%1$s está en su menor precio: -%2$d%% en %3$s!</string> <string name="notif_message_discount">%1$s tiene %2$d%% de descuento en %3$s!</string>
<string name="language_restart_message">Para aplicar los cambios es necesario reiniciar la app. ¿Confirma que quiere reiniciar?</string> <string name="action_apply_changes">Aplicar cambios</string> <string name="action_no_apply">No aplicar</string>
<string name="offline_banner">Estás sin conexión. Los precios pueden estar desactualizados.</string> <string name="prices_from_cache">⚠ Precios cargados desde caché (pueden estar desactualizados)</string> <string name="label_coming_soon">próximamente</string> </resources>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<resources> <string name="app_name">DesaAppsAvalosKoOrtuzarVargas</string>
<string name="nav_offers">Offers</string> <string name="nav_catalog">Catalog</string> <string name="nav_news">News</string> <string name="nav_settings">Settings</string>
<string name="action_search">Search</string> <string name="action_save">Save</string> <string name="action_edit">Edit</string> <string name="action_cancel">Cancel</string> <string name="action_remove">Remove</string> <string name="label_back">Back</string>
<string name="label_all">All</string> <string name="label_favorites">Favorites</string> <string name="label_profile">Profile</string> <string name="label_username">Username</string> <string name="label_email">Email</string> <string name="label_not_set">Not set</string> <string name="label_region">Region</string> <string name="label_country_affects_prices">Country (affects prices)</string> <string name="label_language">Language</string> <string name="language_english">English - EN</string> <string name="language_spanish">Español - ES</string> <string name="label_notifications">Notifications</string> <string name="label_enable_notifications">Enable Notifications</string> <string name="label_alerts_unread">Alerts (%1$d unread)</string> <string name="label_favorites_count">Favorites (%1$d)</string> <string name="label_no_favorites">No favorites yet. Add games from the catalog!</string> <string name="label_notification_prefs">Notification prefs</string> <string name="label_notifications_for_game">Notifications: %1$s</string> <string name="label_offers">Offers</string> <string name="label_news">News</string> <string name="label_historical_low">Historical Low</string>
<string name="games_search_placeholder">Search games or tags...</string> <string name="games_no_results">No games found</string>
<string name="news_filter_all_categories">All Categories</string> <string name="news_category_discounts">Discounts</string> <string name="news_category_updates">Updates</string> <string name="news_category_events">Events</string> <string name="news_no_results">No news found</string> <string name="news_category_format">Category: %1$s</string>
<string name="offers_tab_discounts">Discounts</string> <string name="offers_tab_favorites">Favorites</string> <string name="offers_tab_hist_low">Hist. Low</string> <string name="offers_tab_free">Free</string> <string name="offers_filter_temp_free">Temp. Free</string> <string name="offers_filter_f2p">F2P</string> <string name="offers_filter_all_free">All Free</string> <string name="offers_no_discounts">No discounts available</string>
<string name="game_available_on">Available on</string> <string name="game_release_date">Release Date</string> <string name="game_rating_label">Rating</string> <string name="game_rating_format">%1$.1f / 10</string> <string name="game_historical_discount">Historical Discount</string> <string name="game_description">Description</string> <string name="game_prices">Prices</string> <string name="game_prices_region">%1$s %2$s - Stores available in your region</string> <string name="game_off_percent">%1$d%% off</string> <string name="game_price_usd">US$%1$.2f</string> <string name="game_price_usd_simple">$%1$.2f</string> <string name="game_free">FREE</string> <string name="game_not_available">N/A</string> <string name="game_no_live_data">No live data available - showing cached prices</string> <string name="game_dlcs_expansions">DLCs & Expansions (%1$d)</string> <string name="game_dlc_hist_discount">Hist. discount: %1$d%%</string>
<string name="content_desc_rating">Rating</string> <string name="content_desc_favorite">Favorite</string> <string name="game_historical_discount_short">Historical discount: %1$d%%</string> <string name="game_dlcs_available">%1$d DLC(s) available</string> <string name="game_price_platform">%1$s: $%2$.2f</string> <string name="game_rating_star">★ %1$.1f</string>
<string name="badge_f2p">F2P</string> <string name="badge_free">FREE</string> <string name="badge_free_exclaim">FREE!</string> <string name="discount_badge_percent">-%1$d%%</string> <string name="price_free_to_play">Free to Play</string> <string name="price_was">Was: $%1$.2f</string> <string name="price_free_now">FREE NOW</string> <string name="price_until">Until: %1$s</string> <string name="historical_low_label">★ Historical Low</string>
<string name="notif_title_historical_low">Historical Low!</string> <string name="notif_title_discount">Discount Alert</string> <string name="notif_message_historical_low">%1$s is at its lowest price ever: -%2$d%% on %3$s!</string> <string name="notif_message_discount">%1$s is %2$d%% off on %3$s!</string>
<string name="language_restart_message">To apply changes, the app must restart. Do you want to restart now?</string> <string name="action_apply_changes">Apply changes</string> <string name="action_no_apply">Do not apply</string> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<resources> <string name="app_name">DesaAppsAvalosKoOrtuzarVargas</string>
<string name="nav_offers">Offers</string> <string name="nav_catalog">Catalog</string> <string name="nav_news">News</string> <string name="nav_settings">Settings</string>
<string name="action_search">Search</string> <string name="action_save">Save</string> <string name="action_edit">Edit</string> <string name="action_cancel">Cancel</string> <string name="action_remove">Remove</string> <string name="label_back">Back</string>
<string name="label_all">All</string> <string name="label_favorites">Favorites</string> <string name="label_profile">Profile</string> <string name="label_username">Username</string> <string name="label_email">Email</string> <string name="label_not_set">Not set</string> <string name="label_region">Region</string> <string name="label_country_affects_prices">Country (affects prices)</string> <string name="label_language">Language</string> <string name="language_english">English - EN</string> <string name="language_spanish">Español - ES</string> <string name="label_notifications">Notifications</string> <string name="label_enable_notifications">Enable Notifications</string> <string name="label_alerts_unread">Alerts (%1$d unread)</string> <string name="label_favorites_count">Favorites (%1$d)</string> <string name="label_no_favorites">No favorites yet. Add games from the catalog!</string> <string name="label_notification_prefs">Notification prefs</string> <string name="label_notifications_for_game">Notifications: %1$s</string> <string name="label_offers">Offers</string> <string name="label_news">News</string> <string name="label_historical_low">Historical Low</string>
<string name="games_search_placeholder">Search games or tags...</string> <string name="games_no_results">No games found</string>
<string name="news_filter_all_categories">All Categories</string> <string name="news_category_discounts">Discounts</string> <string name="news_category_updates">Updates</string> <string name="news_category_events">Events</string> <string name="news_no_results">No news found</string> <string name="news_category_format">Category: %1$s</string>
<string name="offers_tab_discounts">Discounts</string> <string name="offers_tab_favorites">Favorites</string> <string name="offers_tab_hist_low">Hist. Low</string> <string name="offers_tab_free">Free</string> <string name="offers_filter_temp_free">Temp. Free</string> <string name="offers_filter_f2p">F2P</string> <string name="offers_filter_all_free">All Free</string> <string name="offers_no_discounts">No discounts available</string>
<string name="game_available_on">Available on</string> <string name="game_release_date">Release Date</string> <string name="game_rating_label">Rating</string> <string name="game_rating_format">%1$.1f / 10</string> <string name="game_historical_discount">Historical Discount</string> <string name="game_description">Description</string> <string name="game_prices">Prices</string> <string name="game_prices_region">%1$s %2$s - Stores available in your region</string> <string name="game_off_percent">%1$d%% off</string> <string name="game_price_usd">US$%1$.2f</string> <string name="game_price_usd_simple">$%1$.2f</string> <string name="game_free">FREE</string> <string name="game_not_available">N/A</string> <string name="game_no_live_data">No live data available - showing cached prices</string> <string name="game_dlcs_expansions">DLCs & Expansions (%1$d)</string> <string name="game_dlc_hist_discount">Hist. discount: %1$d%%</string>
<string name="content_desc_rating">Rating</string> <string name="content_desc_favorite">Favorite</string> <string name="game_historical_discount_short">Historical discount: %1$d%%</string> <string name="game_dlcs_available">%1$d DLC(s) available</string> <string name="game_price_platform">%1$s: $%2$.2f</string> <string name="game_rating_star">★ %1$.1f</string>
<string name="badge_f2p">F2P</string> <string name="badge_free">FREE</string> <string name="badge_free_exclaim">FREE!</string> <string name="discount_badge_percent">-%1$d%%</string> <string name="price_free_to_play">Free to Play</string> <string name="price_was">Was: $%1$.2f</string> <string name="price_free_now">FREE NOW</string> <string name="price_until">Until: %1$s</string> <string name="historical_low_label">★ Historical Low</string>
<string name="notif_title_historical_low">Historical Low!</string> <string name="notif_title_discount">Discount Alert</string> <string name="notif_message_historical_low">%1$s is at its lowest price ever: -%2$d%% on %3$s!</string> <string name="notif_message_discount">%1$s is %2$d%% off on %3$s!</string>
<string name="language_restart_message">To apply changes, the app must restart. Do you want to restart now?</string> <string name="action_apply_changes">Apply changes</string> <string name="action_no_apply">Do not apply</string>
<string name="offline_banner">You are offline. Prices may be outdated.</string> <string name="prices_from_cache">⚠ Prices loaded from cache (may be outdated)</string> <string name="label_coming_soon">coming soon</string> </resources>

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value: # Project-wide Gradle settings. # IDE (e.g. Android Studio) users: # Gradle settings configured through the IDE *will override* # any settings specified in this file. # For more details on how to configure your build environment visit # http://www.gradle.org/docs/current/userguide/build_environment.html # Specifies the JVM arguments used for the daemon process. # The setting is particularly useful for tweaking memory settings. org.gradle.jvmargs=-Xmx2048m -Dfile.encoding=UTF-8 # When configured, Gradle will run in incubating parallel mode. # This option should only be used with decoupled projects. For more details, visit # https://developer.android.com/r/tools/gradle-multi-project-decoupled-projects # org.gradle.parallel=true # Kotlin code style for this project: "official" or "obsolete": kotlin.code.style=official

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: # Project-wide Gradle settings. # IDE (e.g. Android Studio) users: # Gradle settings configured through the IDE *will override* # any settings specified in this file. # For more details on how to configure your build environment visit # http://www.gradle.org/docs/current/userguide/build_environment.html # Specifies the JVM arguments used for the daemon process. # The setting is particularly useful for tweaking memory settings. org.gradle.jvmargs=-Xmx2048m -Dfile.encoding=UTF-8 # When configured, Gradle will run in incubating parallel mode. # This option should only be used with decoupled projects. For more details, visit # https://developer.android.com/r/tools/gradle-multi-project-decoupled-projects # org.gradle.parallel=true # Kotlin code style for this project: "official" or "obsolete": kotlin.code.style=official # Allow KSP-generated Kotlin sources with built-in Kotlin support android.disallowKotlinSourceSets=false

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
